items.headline: SHANE BROWN: The real MVP of the World Cup may be Hidden Valley Ranch
items.summary: This Sunday is the FIFA World Cup Final, bringing to a close a month in which America has collectively come down with a serious case of World Cup Fever.

items.headline: If inflation is 'cooling,' why are prices still so high?
items.summary: Inflation “cooled” in June, thanks in part to falling gas prices. However, the 3.5% annual inflation rate for June was higher than any month of 2025.

items.headline: Cubs, Sox aiming for October
items.summary: Will Venable and Craig Counsell were in good position heading into the All-Star break with teams that had been through various struggles and came out ahead.
